title: Backrooms Eternal
description: A backrooms mod made just for survival and creative!
body:
# Welcome to Backrooms Eternal Refurnished!

**GECKOLIB IS A REQUIREMENT FOR VERSIONS PAST 1.1!!!**

**Backrooms Eternal Refurnished is a remastered version of the original Backrooms Eternal, with a goal to be more polished!**

Join our discord to suggest features, report bugs, and participate in polls: https://discord.gg/yFRZM2T9rQ
 
Current Levels:

- Level 0

- Level 1

- Level 2

- Level 3

- Level 4

- Level 5

- Level 27

- The Hub

## Credits:

Mod icon by Evan2Awesome from our discord server

Caution block and Caution block pillar textures made by Even2Awesome from our discord server

Female Death Moth model and animation by Evan2Awesome from our discord server

Wallpaper Pattern textures in 1.1 and onward by Evan2Awesome from our discord server
